steps.title: Contrast the two compositions
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between Bellard's two compositions. The useful notes show that Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn, while Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 incorporates a Tewa seashell rattle.

steps.title: Reject summary-only choices
steps.content: Choice A describes the works together without specifying how they differ. Choice C only identifies them as Bellard compositions. Choice D says Bellard used different approaches but does not assign a distinct element to each piece. The remaining choice contrasts the hymn with the rattle. The answer is B.
